name: Deep Research Analyst
summary: Runs a durable research loop that gathers sources, summarizes evidence, and refreshes findings on a schedule.
author: MirrorNeuron
command: mn run blueprints/deep-research --set topic="AI workflow runtime"

name: Email Campaign Automation
summary: Turns product signals into segmented outreach, draft review, follow-up scheduling, and result monitoring.
author: MirrorNeuron
command: mn run blueprints/email-campaign --set objective="reactivate trial users"

name: Market Risk Sentinel
summary: Watches market signals, classifies risk events, and produces actionable alerts with retryable background analysis.
author: MirrorNeuron

name: Drug Discovery Screener
summary: Coordinates hypothesis generation, literature review, candidate scoring, and checkpointed experiment planning.
author: MirrorNeuron Labs

name: Incident Commander
summary: Listens for production alerts, gathers context, proposes mitigations, and hands off a durable incident report.
author: MirrorNeuron

name: Support Triage Agent
summary: Groups tickets, drafts replies, detects escalations, and keeps a team-visible queue moving in the background.
author: Community

name: Competitive Intel Monitor
summary: Tracks competitor launches, pricing pages, docs, and changelogs, then summarizes what changed and why it matters.
author: Community

name: Lead Enrichment Loop
summary: Enriches leads, verifies fit, drafts outreach notes, and sleeps until new account signals arrive.
author: MirrorNeuron Labs

name: Policy Review Workflow
summary: Reviews policy drafts against internal rules, flags risky language, and coordinates human approval checkpoints.
author: Community

name: Edge Sensor Anomaly Loop
summary: Runs near data sources, detects anomalies, queues durable investigation work, and syncs summaries to the cloud.
author: MirrorNeuron Labs
